title: Pan-Seared Tomatoes
description: A simple and flavorful dish showcasing the natural sweetness of pan-seared tomatoes. This recipe is perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Any variety will do, but beefsteak or Roma work well

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality oil with a fruity flavor

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince or crush for maximum flavor

ingredients.name: Basil
ingredients.notes: Fresh leaves add a bright, herbaceous note

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use a flaky sea salt for added texture

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the sliced tomatoes to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, until tender and lightly charred.
Sprinkle the chopped basil over the tomatoes and season with salt to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional basil if desired.
